failure.message: upload-persistence-simple.spec.ts:51:2 core workflow: upload file and verify persistence across pages

testcase.failure:
[Mobile Chrome] › upload-persistence-simple.spec.ts:51:2 › Upload and Data Persistence - Core Functionality › core workflow: upload file and verify persistence across pages
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /upload json test data files/i }) - locator resolved to <button aria-label="Upload JSON test data files" class="px-3 py-2 rounded text-sm font-medium border border-border">…</button> - attempting click action 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is visible, enabled and stable - scrolling into view if needed - done scrolling - <button type="button" aria-label="Close filters" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 z-30 lg:hidden border-0 p-0 cursor-default"></button> from <main tabindex="-1" id="main-content" aria-label="Main content">…</main> subtree intercepts pointer events - retrying click action - waiting 20ms 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is visible, enabled and stable - scrolling into view if needed - done scrolling - <button type="button" aria-label="Close filters" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 z-30 lg:hidden border-0 p-0 cursor-default"></button> from <main tabindex="-1" id="main-content" aria-label="Main content">…</main> subtree intercepts pointer events - retrying click action - waiting 100ms 56 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is visible, enabled and stable - scrolling into view if needed - done scrolling - <button type="button" aria-label="Close filters" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 z-30 lg:hidden border-0 p-0 cursor-default"></button> from <main tabindex="-1" id="main-content" aria-label="Main content">…</main> subtree intercepts pointer events - retrying click action - waiting 500ms
81 | 82 | // Step 8: Navigate back to upload page to verify data is still there > 83 | await page.getByRole("button", { name: /upload json test data files/i }).click(); | ^ 84 | await expect(page.getByText("Combined Data Summary")).toBeVisible(); 85 | }); 86 | at /Volumes/Code/claude-workspace-ccl/tools-monorepo/packages/ccl-test-viewer/tests/e2e/upload-persistence-simple.spec.ts:83:76
